description.tr: Checklist for documents, packing and customs on household moves.

title.tr: UK to Turkey Household Goods Moving Guide
title.en: UK to Turkey Household Goods Moving Guide

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Documents

Inventory, insurance and carriage contracts may be requested at export. Turkey-side residency and relief questions are common.
